questions.question_text: What is Super Area? What does PAR stands for? Define Substitute item w.r.t a BOQ. What do you understand by Non-Schedule Item.

UNIT-1 List CPWD publications related to "Specifications, Quantities & Estimation" and provide a brief explanation of each? Write a detailed note on the importance of Specifications in terms of a construction project by giving suitable example. What is Method Statement? Please explain in detail with the help of an example.

UNIT-2 What is BOQ? Create the proforma/ Format of a BOQ for civil works of a residential project. Prepare a rough cost estimate for constructing a two-story residential building with a total built-up area of 1000 sq.m, using PAR 2019 for required data, if any) Explain various types of cost Estimates in detail. Note:  Q. 1 is compulsory.  Use of a calculator is allowed. Subject: Specifications, Quantities & Estimation Subject Code: BAP 212
